assertions.text: Output contains exactly 3 hook options labeled Option 1, Option 2, and Option 3
The three hooks use three different styles: provocative question, surprising statistic, and bold claim
Each hook is 1-3 sentences long, no more
No hook uses the phrase 'in this video' or announces what the content will cover
Output ends with a Guidance line recommending which option fits best and a Next Step specifying which hook to use and which skill to run next

three-options.note: 3 options labeled correctly: Option 1, Option 2, Option 3

distinct-styles.note: Provocative Question, Surprising Statistic, Bold Claim — all distinct

sentence-limit.note: Option 1: 2 sentences, Option 2: 3 sentences, Option 3: 2 sentences

no-meta.note: No 'in this video' or content announcements

guidance-line.note: Guidance recommends Option 2 with rationale. Next Step specifies lead with Option 2 + run seo-title-optimizer

summary.notes: All 5 inputs passed all 5 assertions. Even the edge cases (minimal input 'Sleep', vague input 'technology changing things') produced spec-compliant output with specific statistics, distinct styles, and actionable guidance.
